react-hook-form.reconciliationNotes: Use with zod resolvers. Validate at boundary.

@supabase/supabase-js.reconciliationNotes: Use explicit join hints in .select(), e.g., .select('*, inspections!location_id(*)'). RLS policies govern access.

@tanstack/react-query.reconciliationNotes: Use for all data fetching. Initialize in src/main.tsx.

shadcn.reconciliationNotes: Source of Truth is src/components/ui/. Use local primitives.

@react-pdf/renderer.reconciliationNotes: For print-ready packets. Store in Supabase 'documents' bucket.
